initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count 
    FROM crime 
    WHERE year = 1995 
    GROUP BY district_id 
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 4000
) AS high_crime_regions
WHERE district_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT district_id 
    FROM account 
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) >= '1997'
);

SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
    FROM district
    WHERE crime_count > 4000
    AND district_id IN (
        SELECT district_id 
        FROM account 
        WHERE strftime('%Y', date) >= '1997'
    )
    GROUP BY district_id
);

SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1995'
    GROUP BY district_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 4000
) AS high_crime_regions
WHERE district_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT district_id 
    FROM account 
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) >= '1997'
);

SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count 
    FROM crime 
    WHERE year = 1995 
    GROUP BY district_id 
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 4000
) AS high_crime_regions
WHERE district_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT district_id 
    FROM account 
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) >= '1997'
);

SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count 
    FROM (
        SELECT district_id 
        FROM account 
        WHERE strftime('%Y', date) >= '1997'
        GROUP BY district_id
    ) AS regions_with_accounts_1997
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count 
        FROM account 
        WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1995'
        GROUP BY district_id 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 4000
    ) AS high_crime_1995
    ON regions_with_accounts_1997.district_id = high_crime_1995.district_id
) AS filtered_regions;
